blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L4-W02.
This record does not create docs/product-ui/wiring-roadmap.md or a launch-decision-register owner decision.
This record does not create apps/web/src/data/liveClient.js or refactor apiClient.js through it.
This record does not remove x-lawos-permission-context from client code.
This record does not make live mode the default for wiring steps 1 through 4.
This record does not verify P5, DMS, audit, or admin partial surfaces as live.
This record does not create the step 5 fixture-retention tracker.
This record does not satisfy L4-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
